creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
makc        2010-10-30 21:23:47 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Added files:
    audio/mangler        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Add new port audio/mangler:
  
  Mangler is an open source VOIP client capable of connecting to
  Ventrilo 3.x servers.
  
  WWW:    http://www.mangler.org
  
  PR:             ports/151566
  Submitted by:   Janik Galasso <janik at hikarihq.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1       +27 -0     ports/audio/mangler/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/audio/mangler/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/audio/mangler/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +9 -0      ports/audio/mangler/pkg-plist (new)
